allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement payment notification system with multi-channel support

- Add DefaultNotificationConfig model for system-wide notification settings
- Add ClientNotificationConfig model for per-client overrides
- Add NotificationLog model for full audit trail
- Implement notification services with envio_factura condition logic
- Add scaffold for dias_credito_vencido condition \(to be completed later\)
- Support email \(working\), WhatsApp and SMS \(scaffold\) channels
- Add send_notifications management command for daily cron execution
- Register notification app in INSTALLED_APPS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
